metadata.description: Open-source AI agent skills for legal professionals, by Chen Friedman / Lawcal AI.

plugins.name: legal-skills
plugins.description: Maps a folder of legal case documents into 10 cross-referenced analysis files. Extracts text from PDFs, Word, emails, spreadsheets, images, audio, and video. 8 language packs: English, Hebrew, Arabic, Russian, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese.
